no: Legacy mega-mod. TDDz is the EE/EET-compatible version by JohnBob. Some components may have rough edges. Known warning: ADD_WORLDMAP_LINKS uses invalid from_node (~N~), WeiDU defaults to all nodes. Non-fatal, travel links work correctly.

in.t: Download TDD v1.14 and extract the TDD/ folder to your BG2EE game directory.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs
Phase corrected from BG1 to SoA; author identified as TeamBG

conflicts.reason: Choose one Kivan in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Kivan if TDD's kivan10.cre detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME kivan10.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Xzar/Monty reference), 2026-03

dependencies.reason: Reported as requirement by LCC-docs database (lcc id 1601 requires 146)
Reported as requirement by LCC-docs database (lcc id 1601 requires 1062)

sum: Massive BG1 expansion adding an extended quest chain, dozens of new areas, and many hours of content. One of the largest classic BG1 mods.
au: Roxanne (BWP EET port of TDD by Rastor/SimDing0)

co.no: Requires TDD/ resource folder (i=716) extracted to game folder first. TDDz.tp2 references TDD/ subfolders (Bam, ogg, ARE, MOS, WED, ITM, BAM, TIZ, CRE, STO, SPL) via Lib/Importer.tpa.

co.tp2n: TDD - Onset of the Darkest Day
co.no: PARSE ERROR (non-fatal): DDGAME03.BAF line 12 references SUMMON_SKELETON_WARRIOR3 which does not exist in Spell.IDS — likely a pre-EE spell identifier never updated for EE. One RESPONSE block in the Cyric finale encounter won't fire (skeleton warrior summon). Other responses in the same script work fine.

co.n: Use BGGO extended BG1 areas for TDDz
co.tp2n: Use BGGO extended BG1 areas for TDDz
